idea-plugin.name: Large File Compare
idea-plugin.description:
Large File Compare

Sort and diff very large text files (200k–2M lines) that your IDE's built-in diff viewer chokes on — SQL exports, CSV dumps, structured logs, and configuration files.

Features

  • Side-by-side diff view with per-row colour coding: added / removed / changed / unchanged
  • Three diff modes: Positional (line order, default), Set (sorted order, no pairing), Key Column (record reconciliation by a unique ID field)
  • Sort before diffing: alphabetical or numeric, ascending or descending
  • Find across both panes with case and regular-expression options and previous / next navigation
  • Export the diff to CSV or plain text, all rows or changed rows only
  • Ignore-whitespace and “show edits as changed” toggles
  • Case-insensitive comparison toggle
  • Patience diff algorithm: stays fast on 200k–1M line files where a naive O(m×n) LCS would collapse
  • Works in every IntelliJ-platform IDE (IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, CLion, …)

Usage

  1. Open Tools → Large File Compare: Compare Two Files
  2. Pick the left file, then the right file
  3. The Large File Compare tool window opens with the side-by-side diff
  4. Adjust mode, sort, and key-column options in the toolbar and click Recompute to re-diff; use the find box and Export button to search and save results
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0
  • Sort before diffing: alphabetical / numeric, ascending / descending
  • Find across both panes with case and regex options and prev/next navigation
  • Export the diff to CSV or plain text (all rows or changed rows only)
  • Ignore-whitespace and “show edits as changed” toggles
0.1.0 — Initial release
  • Side-by-side diff view rendered via a virtualized JBTable (renders only visible rows; 1M-row results load in seconds)
  • Positional, Set, and Key-Column diff modes selectable from the toolbar
  • Case-insensitive comparison option
  • Recompute after option changes without re-reading files
  • Row colour-coding with IntelliJ light/dark theme support via JBColor
  • Patience diff with Sorensen–Dice similarity pairing for “changed” row detection

action.text: Large File Compare: Compare Two Files
action.description: Sort and compare two large text files side by side
